eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Hays, TX; at 08:24 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 12:24 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Hays County Office of Emergency Services - This is a test, this is a test, this is a test of the Hays County Emergency Alert System. This is only a test, had this been an actual emergency you would receive information on how to take emergency action to protect yourself.
